title: clerodendrum fischeri var. robustum
intro: Clerodendrum fischeri var. robustum, commonly known as the 'Clerodendrum robustum', is a variety of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been used to improve respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate coughs and colds, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Clerodendrum fischeri var. robustum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to be made for medicinal use.
